data.label: 欢太账号 OAuth 授权 SDK
data.description: 欢太账号 OAuth 授权 SDK 是向您提供的基于 Oauth2.0 标准协议的快捷登录服务，用户可以通过授权的方式直接登录手机上的欢太账号，快速访问您的应用。

data.label: Huantai Account OAuth Authorization SDK
data.description: The Huantai Account OAuth Authorization SDK provides a quick login service based on the OAuth 2.0 standard protocol. Users can directly log in to the Huantai account on their phones through authorization and quickly access your application.
